mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_OP_LOG_TB ( USER_ID, DEPT, SBK_NO, OP_TYPE, UPLOAD_SRC, DAV_PATH, SRC_PATH, DST_PATH, IS_FOLDER, FILE_NAME, CONTENT_TYPE, FILE_SIZE, BYTES_SENT, CLIENT_IP, USER_AGENT, RESULT_CD, ERR_MSG, CREAT_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{dept}, #{sbkNo}, #{opType}, #{uploadSrc}, #{davPath}, #{srcPath}, #{dstPath}, #{isFolder}, #{fileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{bytesSent}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{resultCd}, #{errMsg}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE FILE_OP_LOG_TB SET RESULT_CD = #{resultCd}, ERR_MSG = #{errMsg}, FILE_SIZE = COALESCE(#{fileSize}, FILE_SIZE), BYTES_SENT = COALESCE(#{bytesSent}, BYTES_SENT), UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.select:
SELECT L.LOG_ID AS logId, CASE WHEN L.IS_FOLDER = 'Y' THEN '폴더' ELSE '파일' END AS itemType, CASE WHEN L.IS_FOLDER = 'Y' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(L.DAV_PATH, '/', -2), '/', 1) ELSE SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(L.DAV_PATH, '/', -2), '/', 1) END AS folderLocation, COALESCE( NULLIF(L.FILE_NAME, ''), SUBSTRING_INDEX(L.DAV_PATH, '/', -1) ) AS fileName, L.DEPT AS dept, L.USER_ID AS userId, M.MEM_NAME AS userName, L.OP_TYPE AS opType, CASE L.OP_TYPE WHEN 'UPLOAD' THEN '업로드' WHEN 'DOWNLOAD' THEN '다운로드' WHEN 'DOWNLOAD_FOLDER' THEN '폴더다운로드' WHEN 'MKDIR' THEN '생성' WHEN 'DELETE' THEN '삭제' WHEN 'RENAME' THEN '이름변경' WHEN 'MOVE' THEN '이동' WHEN 'COPY' THEN '복사' WHEN 'PREVIEW' THEN '미리보기' WHEN 'ONLYOFFICE_OPEN' THEN '편집열기' WHEN 'ONLYOFFICE_SAVE' THEN '편집저장' WHEN 'CONVERT_TO_PDF' THEN 'PDF변환' WHEN 'CONVERT_TO_PDF_SAVE' THEN 'PDF변환저장' ELSE L.OP_TYPE END AS opTypeLabel, L.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, L.UPLOAD_SRC AS uploadSrc, CASE L.UPLOAD_SRC WHEN 'E' THEN 'ERP' WHEN 'A' THEN '연동' ELSE '-' END AS uploadSrcLabel, DATE_FORMAT(L.CREAT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS creatDt, L.DAV_PATH AS davPath, L.SBK_NO AS sbkNo, L.RESULT_CD AS resultCd FROM FILE_OP_LOG_TB L LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TB M ON M.ID = L.USER_ID
ORDER BY L.CREAT_DT DESC, L.LOG_ID DESC LIMIT #{pageUnit} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN L.IS_FOLDER = 'N' THEN L.FILE_SIZE ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalBytes, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN L.IS_FOLDER = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalFileCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN L.IS_FOLDER = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalFolderCount FROM FILE_OP_LOG_TB L
